title: Add and Search Word - Data structure design
problem_statement: Design a data structure that supports adding words and searching with support for dot "." wildcards.

examples.input: addWord("bad"), addWord("dad"), addWord("mad"), search("pad"), search("bad"), search(".ad"), search("b..")
examples.explanation: Words are added, and searches use exact or wildcard matching.

constraints: At most 3 * 10^4 calls will be made to addWord and search.
intuition: Use a trie to store words and perform recursive search when wildcards appear.

approaches.name: Trie with recursive wildcard search
approaches.description: Store words in a trie and recursively explore all child nodes when encountering a dot wildcard.
approaches.time: O(m * 26^k) in the worst case, where m is word length and k is number of wildcards
approaches.why_not: Using a list of words and checking each search is too slow for repeated wildcard queries.

interview_qa.q: Why use a trie for this problem?
interview_qa.a: A trie stores words by prefix and allows efficient wildcard searches by exploring relevant branches.

interview_qa.q: How does the dot wildcard work?
interview_qa.a: It matches any single letter, so the search branches into all child nodes at that position.
